public_projection.title: Veridium Port
public_projection.summary: Gateway of the Western Sea — the largest harbor in Akalynth.
public_projection.body: Veridium Port connects the great civilizations through trade, exploration, and information. Known for the Grand Harbor, the Merchant Guilds, the Sea Archives, the Explorer Houses, and the Crystal Lighthouse.
